name: Weekdone
description: Weekdone is continuous performance management tool that uses OKRs & weekly check-ins to help businesses focus on getting real results. Learn more about Weekdone

reviews.review_title: Weekdone is simple and very helpful
reviews.review_pros: I believe most of the features it has are really helpful all the way from the OKR philosophy to the simple tools for weekly reporting, regular goal setting, internal communication and feedback provision. I recently started using Weekdone together with Zapier to automate the introduction of tasks from my daily calendar and works splendid. The customer support and interaction with the development team is really great and the do care about you and your needs. Well done!
reviews.review_cons: Sometimes I would like to have a better way to know what it will take to incorporate my feedback into new releases as some of the features that I have requested are really needed. I also believe that the dashboard for quantitative progress analysis, while really very helpful, is somewhat cryptic. I would like to have an easier way to understand how to reflect progress on tasks/OKRs from the individual level to the company level.

reviews.review_title: free is always better
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
reviews.review_description: so far so good. easy and quick to set up my free account and love being able to organize goals, tasks at hand, and look into future of what is upcoming..simple lay out and dont need technical background to use plus has a mobile app which is a positive for me.
reviews.review_pros: great for planning ahead simple and easy to use with smooth interface on home page process to set up account was fast!
reviews.review_cons: none at this time as im still new to this site.

reviews.review_title: SLOW SLOW SLOW
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
reviews.review_pros: Generally speaking the UI is well thought. I believe in OKRs software to improve team performance.
reviews.review_cons: It's slow, oh boy, like very slow. You click to create a new item and it takes a few seconds to load the pop up for example... They should really work on their app performance. Devs should be ashame to provide such a slugish experience that is ruining the whole user experience.

reviews.review_title: Weekdone review
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: It allows for tracking of OKRs and other objectives
reviews.review_cons: It is complicated and not intuitive to users

reviews.review_title: I wish I had this tool years ago
reviews.review_description: Overall the experience is positive & allows for collaboration across teams. I appreciate accessing the OKR hierarchy and mapping efforts to the larger company goals.
reviews.review_pros: For most of my career OKRs seemed to be amorphous and hard to track. Often, it would be at year-end when you learned about your successes or challenges. With Weekdone everything is highly visible to all team members & gives clear indicators of your current progress in real-time.
reviews.review_cons: Often, I mistakenly click comment instead of initiative and vice versa.

reviews.review_title: Not sorry to see us go
reviews.review_description: It was very good for the period we had it. We are very disappointed that we didn't get support at a time of need.
reviews.review_pros: We were users of Weekdone since 2017 when we were looking to substitue Rhythm for a less expensive, more automated alternative. We were happy with the OKR capabilities and used it both for quarterly and yearly planning and for everyday execution/supervision, weekly management committee meetings, and employee feedback
reviews.review_cons: It doesn't have a KPI feature. The pandemic put us on the brink of bankruptcy and we requested a temporary rebate or deferral. Weekdone was unresponsive and disconnected us when we failed to make our yearly payment right at the peak of the pandemic.

reviews.review_title: An organization-wide to do list!
reviews.review_description: Our organization use Weekdone on a daily basis as a way to track quarterly objectives and key ratios. Each department head creates a road map and uploads their objectives into Weekdone for the team. From here we can easily track progress for our teams and teams that we work with regularly.
reviews.review_pros: Weekdone is an incredible tool for helping teams see what their future plans are and the progress that has been made to get accomplish those plans. We use the platform for a way to track things we're working on during the quarter by breaking them down into weekly tasks. It is helpful that we can link each task to our quarterly objectives and set a due date. We can also tag colleagues in our plans and add comments and/or attachments for easy sharing throughout the organization.
reviews.review_cons: The weekly reporting can be a little busy and there are some aspects that are not needed, like the weekly job satisfaction scale.

reviews.review_title: Progress on objectives visualized
reviews.review_pros: I like that you can have a hierarchical view of our objectives and drill down on how teams contribute to these objectives.
reviews.review_cons: I sometimes find it hard to navigate through the product as there are several ways to accomplish things.

reviews.review_title: Great Product with Many Uses!
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: It is such a helpful tool for me to make sure that I am staying on top of my to do list. It has become a game changer in our remote work environment. I know that my manager has access to see what I'm working on and it keeps me accountable.
reviews.review_cons: I honestly can't think of any things that need improvement. There was a bit of a learning curve when I first started, but now that I have used it for awhile I feel comfortable with all the pieces of it.

reviews.review_title: Really great software for planning and keeping track of OKR's within teams.
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: I love all the features that come with the software. The weekly planning keeps me accountable to actually completing my OKR's. I even gave up other softwares once I started using the weekly planning.
reviews.review_cons: There is definitely a learning curve to using Week Done. At the beginning it can be confusing, but with the help from the Week Done support team it became much more clear on how teams within the software should be set up.

reviews.review_title: Muy buena interfaz grafica, con mejoras en caracteristicas
reviews.review_description: Ha ayudado mucho en la organizacion y alineamiento de objetivos de cada equipo con la empresa, ha sido un termometro para detectar que debemso reforzar con cada equipo.
reviews.review_pros: Tiene mucha facilidad de uso, las configuraciones no son complejas posiblemente algo confusas de inicio pero despues es bastante facil, la interfaz y su personalizacion son muy bonitas y brindan una buena experiencia en el usuario. El registro de historiales y/o logs de todo lo realizado por permite a nivel de administracion poder verificar fechas, tiempos, acciones realizadas y detectar el uso que el usuario le da a la herramienta.
reviews.review_cons: Creo que la herramienta seria mas completa si tuviera la gestion de KPIs un poco mas completa, revisamos que tiene algunas cosas pero los KPIs solo los permite por equipos y limitados, por lo que seria ideal que tambien Weekdone pudiera ofrecer una gestion de KPIs mas completa de forma que pueda complementarse a los OKRs.

reviews.review_title: Get it done on time
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: This helped the team stay on top of the project. We need the ability to work on a project 24/7 to ensure we make the changes as it is very case-specific and with very strict deadlines.
reviews.review_cons: Teaching the program to novice project partners was a little difficult as they did not have the intuitive skills for this program. They caught on fairly quickly, but we can be pushy, so it was a little intimidating for them.

reviews.review_title: Goal tracking becomes easy
reviews.review_description: Can be very useful in both cases: personal goal tracking and business OKR tracking
reviews.review_pros: I was looking at the market and tried to find a simple and affordable solution to manage progress on my goals. And that is it, nothing more to add.
reviews.review_cons: It is all about weekly base. If you prefer monthly base and reports then it is not right software. But I think it is easy to switch and track the progress from week to week.

reviews.review_title: Great tool for tracking OKRs
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Weekdone has been easy to roll out for our organization, and been an effective way to track our OKRs. This tools helped to provide some structure around the way our organization talks about objectives and key results.
reviews.review_pros: Visually attractive and easy to use. Provides a centralized view of our organizations progress on OKRS.
reviews.review_cons: Lack of recurring tasks, lack of ability to tie in to data sources that automatically adjust progress based on the data.

reviews.review_title: Avoid Weekdone at all costs
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: I found their customer service to be novice. You can tell this program is a one many show. They have very poor support. I actually signed up for the paid subscription by mistake. I emailed them and they would not refund me. This program is a joke.
reviews.review_pros: Nothing. It comes off as easy to use but quickly becomes disorganized.
reviews.review_cons: The program is poorly built. It starts nice but becomes messy very quickly. You are much better off with a different program. I switched to Ally. The pricing model at Weekdone is also "stupid". They charge you a package price. You pay a monthly amount for 6-10 users. That means you end up paying more per user if you only have 6 users. Most of the other platforms charge per user.

reviews.review_title: Value added!
reviews.review_description: Weekdone makes it easy to look back on successes of the team. This did wonders for our moral.
reviews.review_pros: I value documenting successes of our team and easily downloading history.
reviews.review_cons: For a time, downloading history was difficult.

reviews.review_title: I use weekdone to say my team what I am doing and why...
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: It can give to me KPI of my productivity.
reviews.review_cons: At the beginning it was kinda hard to understand

reviews.review_title: Breathtakingly convient in setup and handling. Best of its kind!
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: One of the most rewarding things in using your tool is the level of service, we actually started to copy it in dealing with our clients. You are one of the best managed services we have seen.
reviews.review_pros: One of the most rewarding things in using your tool is the level of service, we actually started to copy it in dealing with our clients. You are one of the best managed services we have seen.
reviews.review_cons: Nothing, all ideas I thought of are in their building pipeline! I am really looking forward to the yearly sprint feature.

reviews.review_title: Collaborative tool to track company's and team's OKRs
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: It's a nice tool to keep track of progress of yourself, team, and company and provides useful graphs and overviews. I can prioritise much better since I've been using Weekdone
reviews.review_pros: It's easy to see and track the progress of your own goals, the team's and company's OKRs. The graphs are provide a nice overview of the achievements and progress.
reviews.review_cons: It takes a bit of time to get used to it, as it offers many possibilities to assign, reschedule and adjust the goals. I haven't used the 1:1 modules or weekly tasks yet.

reviews.review_title: The Solution for Efficient Team Management
reviews.review_description: Overall, I would recommend Weekdone to any company or team looking for a tool to help with task and goal management. Despite its limitations, Weekdone is a powerful tool that can help teams stay organized and focused on achieving their objectives. With its customizable dashboard, automated reminders, and other features, Weekdone is a great option for teams of all sizes and types.
reviews.review_pros: As a user of Weekdone software in a company, I have found it to be a useful tool for tracking and managing tasks and goals. One of the main advantages of Weekdone is its ability to help teams stay organized and aligned by providing a central platform for tracking progress and sharing updates.One of the key features of Weekdone is its customizable dashboard, which allows users to create and monitor their own individual goals and tasks, as well as those of their team. This dashboard can be set up to display information in a variety of formats, such as graphs or charts, making it easy to see progress at a glance.Another useful feature of Weekdone is the ability to set up automated reminders and notifications for upcoming deadlines or missed goals. This helps to ensure that everyone is aware of what needs to be done and when, which can help to improve productivity and efficiency.
reviews.review_cons: However, there are some limitations to Weekdone. For example, it can sometimes be difficult to navigate, especially for new users who are not familiar with the software. Additionally, some users may find the interface to be somewhat cluttered or overwhelming, which can make it difficult to focus on important tasks.

reviews.review_title: the perfect tool for managing workflow in smaller project teams
reviews.review_description: Weekdone is our go-to work management software for project ideas at the conception stage. The easy to learn and operate feel of it allows us to quick set up new projects and get the team rolling. We are therefore able to quickly move from ideation to piloting. And we have been able to successfully develop 30+ ideas into actual projects through Weekdone.
reviews.review_pros: The automatically generated weekly reports analyzing team's progress on tasks and overall performance indicators allowed me to improve in my role as Team Lead considerably. And because they get sent to email directly, I am able to check and read through over the weekend without needing to log into the software to assess the past week and begin planning for the next.
reviews.review_cons: Weekdone focuses on a few specialized features and delivers them well. For much more complicated project teams and workflow systems, it doesn't perform as effectively.

reviews.review_title: Afforbably OKRs and Coaching
reviews.review_description: When our [SENSITIVE CONTENT] and Executive Team decided to implement OKR's for our organization we had a two-fold learning curve and need. We needed a method to track the Objectives and Key Results, but also we needed to learn and understand the general principles and methodology behind OKR's. Weekdone, both through its design, and especially through the great onboarding and coaching, facilitated both of these in a clear an efficient manner for our organization.
reviews.review_pros: A great way to track OKRs and the implementation team and ongoing coaching was invaluable
reviews.review_cons: There are few less important features that still don't display well (e.g. emailed reports), and a few of the configuration options take a while to understand and fine tune

reviews.review_title: Perfect for task allocation and team building
reviews.review_description: Its been great and usefull for team building and boosting employee moral.
reviews.review_pros: Easy to use and configure, track progress and generation of reports.
reviews.review_cons: Little on the costly side and higher hardware is needed.

reviews.review_title: a very practical tool that has fueled our productivity to great levels
reviews.review_description: Weekdone has been a blessing to our private practice in particular. It really helped us in the very early stages when we were always overwhelmed and overburdened by the seemingly endless heap of tasks and responsibilities that needed to be taken care of. And our small staff size never seemed adequate, until Weekdone came in and reorganized our entire operational setup. Not only were we able to sail the storms, we managed to expand in the very first full year of operation.
reviews.review_pros: Once we started using Weekdone, it had an immense impact on the culture of our workplace. The process of developing OKRs allows us to perform the closest thing to a business deep cleanse. We weekly plans and progress tracking components allow us to focus our energies and resources much more productively and precisely. And the results have been telling.
reviews.review_cons: 3 seems like a really odd number as the team size limit for the free version. Increasing it to 5 seems would really help smaller businesses like mine. Although I must say that it is great that the free usage offers the complete features package.

reviews.review_title: Value for Team members that translates to Value for management
reviews.review_description: I like the OKR method. It is logical, and the focus that Weekdone brings to progressing to your goals one week at a time really works for me and my team. Also, we are a start-up, so it is a great substitute for a formal objectives management process from HR.
reviews.review_pros: Personal level: Planning the weeks work, prioritizing and most important checking that I'm actually working on tasks that move me closer to achieving my quarterly goals. It's a breeze to set up your plan for the week. For my team: facilitating great discussions about what they are doing, how they are tracking to the goals, and where they need assistance. HR mandated quarterly, semi-annual or annual sit-downs seem a waste of time because we're all in sync and I'm able to document that.
reviews.review_cons: I wish they had recurring events/tasks but of course that is against their philosophical design as the recurring events tend not to be ones that progress you towards any substantial company or personal objective. Still, it is my weekly planner and there are things I HAVE to do that recur.
